rulings.Case Title: RAFAEL TRUJILLO et al VS. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 7, 2008 LINE 13. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE ON STATE FARM & CASUALTY CO. V SUPERIOR COURT (1988) 46 CAL 3D 287 IS NOT PERSUASIVE. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE A BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 17200 CLAIM. MORADI-SHALAL V FIREMEN'S INSURANCE CO. (1988) 46 CAL 3D 287 AND CEL-TECH COMMUNICATION, INC. V LOS ANGELES CELLULAR TELEPHONE CO. (1999) 20 CAL APP 4TH 163. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 7, 2008 LINE 17. DEFENDANT MALA TAYLOR'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. rulings.Case Title: SANGER SACRMAENTO STREET, LLC VS. HE YU JUN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 7, 2008 LINE 20. PLAINTIFF SANGER SACRAMENTO STREET, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER PROSTITUTION IS TAKING PLACE ON THE PREMISES GIVEN THE CONFLICTING DECLARATIONS. DEFENDANTS OBJECTIONS TO THE FOLLOWING EXHIBITS ARE SUSTAINED: D, E, AND F. THE FOLLOWING OBJECTIONS OF DEFENDANT ARE OVERRULED: A, B, AND C ARE ADMITTED, NOT FOR THE TRUTH OF THE CONTENTS, BUT FOR PLAINTIFF'S UNDERSTANDING; G, H, J AND K, AND THE OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATIONS. =(302/PJM/VC)
